name: io.github.verrysimatupang99/aegis
title: Aegis
description: Transparent, constitution-bound defensive security copilot. Scans code/files for secrets, obfuscated loaders, suspicious dependencies, Dockerfile/IaC misconfigurations, and filesystem hygiene. All actions gated by an immutable charter; defensive-only by design.

environmentVariables.name: AEGIS_HOME
environmentVariables.description: Project root containing data/mythos.yaml. Defaults to current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Only needed if you call the `aegis advise` cloud LLM path.
